title: An evaluation of afamitresgene autoleucel for the treatment of advanced synovial sarcoma and myxoid round cell liposarcoma.
abstract: Synovial sarcoma (SyS) and myxoid round-cell liposarcoma (MRCL) are rare, aggressive soft tissue sarcomas with poor outcomes at the advanced and metastatic stage. Novel therapeutic strategies are urgently needed. Afamitresgene autoleucel (afami-cel) is the first Food and Drug Administration (FDA)-approved, affinity-enhanced T-cell receptor (TCR) therapy targeting the cancer-testis antigen MAGE-A4 in HLA-A*02-positive patients.
